risk_description: Hospital has no public visiting-student / observership / elective / sub-I / rotation source page. Only ACGME residencies are documented.
banned_claim: Cannot claim visiting student program; cannot claim observership program; cannot claim USCE access; cannot list on public pilot.

risk_description: GME page is residency-only; would mislead an applicant searching for USCE.
banned_claim: Do not say IMG-friendly; do not say accepts visiting students; do not list under clerkships/electives/observerships.

risk_description: Caribbean / IMG / out-of-state / for-profit-school students explicitly excluded by official affiliation policy.
required_caveat: If listed for any other lane: must state "Texas-physical non-profit LCME schools with current affiliation agreement only" verbatim.
banned_claim: Cannot say IMG-friendly; cannot say Caribbean accessible; cannot say nationwide; cannot imply VSLO acceptance for non-Texas applicants.
notes: Could be a future READY_PUBLIC_US_ONLY_TEXAS_NONPROFIT row but is too narrow for the IMG-focused micro-pilot.

risk_description: Affiliation agreement required at the school level; one-off student requests excluded.
required_caveat: Required caveat: "School-level affiliation agreement required; individual applications not accepted."

risk_description: No site-specific Western Psychiatric visiting-student page; system-level UPSOM/UPMC pages apply; site placement not guaranteed.
required_caveat: Required caveat: "System-level source — Western Psychiatric site placement not separately guaranteed." (Same wording pattern as CC Hillcrest pill.)
banned_claim: Cannot claim Western Psychiatric site-specific elective availability.
notes: Mirror the SYSTEM_PAGE_NO_SITE_SPECIFIC_GUARANTEE pill from the existing pilot.

risk_description: Domestic program LCME/AOA-only (excludes Caribbean); international program admits enrolled-final-year-students only and is silent on Caribbean accreditation specifically.
required_caveat: Required caveats: "Domestic visiting program: LCME / AOA accredited home institutions in North America only" and "International visiting program: enrolled international students in final year of medical education only — graduates excluded".
banned_claim: Cannot claim observerships for graduates; cannot claim broad IMG pathway.

safe_public_wording_possible: 500 per clinical elective; domestic program fee not located in this capture.

risk_description: Source provides acceptance letter / invoice for visa purposes but does NOT state J-1 or H-1B sponsorship.
required_caveat: Required caveat: "B-1/B-2 visa documentation supported on acceptance; J-1 / H-1B sponsorship not stated on source."
banned_claim: Cannot claim J-1 sponsored; cannot claim H-1B sponsored.

risk_description: System-level NYC H+H MOSAIC program; participants matched to a participating site (could be Lincoln or another H+H facility). No Lincoln-specific placement guarantee.
required_caveat: Required caveat: "System-level source — Lincoln site placement not separately guaranteed."
notes: Same SYSTEM_PAGE_NO_SITE_SPECIFIC_GUARANTEE pattern as CC Hillcrest.

risk_description: Eligibility limited to US LCME allopathic OR AOA osteopathic medical students. Caribbean / IMG explicitly excluded by accreditation language.
required_caveat: Required caveat: "U.S. LCME-accredited allopathic OR AOA-accredited osteopathic medical students only".
banned_claim: Cannot claim Caribbean accessible; cannot claim IMG accessible.
notes: Bucket would be READY_PUBLIC_US_ONLY similar to CCF Mercy.

required_caveat: 000 housing stipend documented; tuition / fees not stated separately.
